title: Malpighiodes leucanthele
taxonomy: Malpighiodes leucanthele is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is a member of the Malpighiaceae family, which includes about 130 genera of flowering plants. The Malpighiaceae family is part of the larger order Malpighiales, which comprises approximately 16 orders of flowering plants. Malpighiaceae plants are primarily found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. The classification of Malpighiodes leucanthele is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae.
